title: Verify Trademark Request
description: Ask a brand-agent whether a trademark is owned, licensed in, or licensed out by this brand. Used in creative approval workflows, brand-safety pipelines, and any consumer that needs the brand's authoritative ownership statement over a mark. Read-only; naturally idempotent.

mark.description: The registered mark as published (e.g., 'AIR JORDAN', 'NIKE', 'SWOOSH'). At minimum, callers must provide the mark text; registry and number narrow the query when multiple registrations exist.

registry.description: Trademark registry (e.g., 'USPTO', 'EUIPO', 'JPO', 'CNIPA'). Strongly recommended when the same mark is registered separately by different parties across jurisdictions.

number.description: Registration number as issued by the registry. Most precise narrowing key; agents will use this when present.

countries.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes scoping the query. If a brand owns a mark in some jurisdictions and not others, this lets the caller ask about the specific region.

use_case.description: Optional caller-declared use case. The agent MAY scope its answer (e.g., a brand may permit editorial use of a mark but not commercial use).
